name: HWR_MENTOR_PRFL_LANGUAGE
description: This table stores mentor language and proficiency information.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is the person ID of the profile for language info is stored

columns.Name: READING_PROFICIENCY
columns.Comments: This column stores the reading proficiency.

columns.Name: WRITING_PROFICIENCY
columns.Comments: This column stores the writing proficiency.

columns.Name: SPEAKING_PROFICIENCY
columns.Comments: This column stores the speaking proficiency.

columns.Name: AOE_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: MPL_ATTR_1: This is an extra column in case if needed

columns.Name: MPL_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: MPL_ATTR_2: This is an extra column in case if needed

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
